_comment: AUTHORED TRAJECTORY as Conjecture Script JSON. The path story is turns (twists); expected envelopes are invariants + allowed_outcomes + trajectory_invariants. This is the golden the runner plays — not a chat novel.
description: Authored trajectory: open cost_out on wf_1 → continue with volume change; owner, pin, blocks_resolve must hold

in_scope: mid-flight sole-continue on a pinned workflow
expected_refusal: illegal restart that wipes active cost_out mid-continue
steal exclusive_owner to front_door while mid-flight

trajectory_invariants.reason: across the path, cost_out must own at least once (and stay legal)
identity pin must not flip or drop across the trajectory
at most one owner transition on this short path (enter → hold)

turns._twist: 1 — enter mid-flight: start cost_out and bind workflow pin
2 — continue mid-flight: same owner + same pin + no re-resolve

invariants.reason: continue must not steal to front_door
identity must survive the continue twist
